basic_details.job_title: NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Srinagar has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or a relevant subject with a minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Sc. in Chemistry or a relevant subject with a minimum 55% marks. Prior research experience in the area of Surface Chemistry, Nanomaterials or Bioinspired Surfaces is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 37000/-per month + 20% HRA (first two years), Rs 42000/-per month + 20% HRA (3rd year)
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs 37000/-per month + 20% HRA for the first two years (as JRF) Junior Research Fellow: Rs 42000/-per month + 20% HRA for 3rd year (as SRF)

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Chemistry or a related subject with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs 37,000/- per month plus 20% HRA for the first two years, and Rs 42,000/- per month plus 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their complete application along with a detailed CV and supporting documents via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any prior research experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Prior research experience in Surface Chemistry, Nanomaterials, or Bioinspired Surfaces is desirable but not strictly mandatory as per the summary.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of this job at NIT Srinagar?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar is a temporary role, typically associated with a specific research project.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ECRG/2025/001612/CS.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit, performance in the interview, and the specific requirements of the research project.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Srinagar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Srinagar is located in Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 190006.
